column2: Define all building assemblies in the following building section tabs.
Review the selected materials in the REVIEW tab.
View the carbon emissions report in the RESULTS tabs.

Helpful Notes:
- See the Glossary tab for descriptions of unfamiliar terms or acronyms.
- Use the User-Defined tab for any materials you wish to add but that could not be included in the section tabs.
- To jump to a tab, right-click the arrows in the lower left corner and select the tab.
- All framing spacing is 24 inches on centre by default, even when Framing Spacing value is blank
